profile.bio: Emerging AI/ML professional with a strong foundation in Python, Machine Learning, and Intelligent Systems development, and interested in leveraging practical experience to solve complex challenges in a cutting-edge environment.

projects.title: Traffic rule violation detection and e-challan generation
projects.description: Real-time Violation Detection and Automated Evidence and ANPR for E-Challan Generation.

projects.title: AI Agent for News Fetching
projects.description: Designed a terminal-based Al agent for real-time news fetching and advanced information retrieval.

projects.title: Caries Classification and Cancer Cell Detection with Explainable AI
projects.description: Developed deep learning models to classify dental caries and detect cancer cells from medical images. Integrated Explainable AI (Grad-CAM++) to visualize important regions influencing predictions, improving transparency and clinical trust.

experience.description: Took ownership of building a standalone AI agent using Google ADK alongside a team developing a larger agent system. Delivered real-time news analysis capabilities using Google Search API and Gemini-powered NLP reasoning.

Acted as a student liaison between the innovation hub and campus community. Promoted startup culture, innovation programs, hackathons, and technical workshops. Coordinated events and helped onboard students to entrepreneurship and AI/ML initiatives.

experience.company: Dhanekula Institute of Engg and Tech
experience.description: Conducted research in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with a focus on energy-efficient algorithms and intelligent systems. Worked on Soft Computing-Driven Energy-Efficient Algorithm Design integrating hybrid optimization and machine learning techniques.

education.institution: Dhanekula Institute of Engg And Tech
